title: Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates!
